title: Evening congestion near Domlur
content: Domlur and Indiranagar experience high evening congestion. Metro is usually more predictable for trips toward MG Road during peak hours.

title: Parking difficulty near MG Road
content: MG Road parking availability is unreliable after office hours. Drivers may spend additional time looking for parking near Brigade Road and Church Street.

title: Purple Line reliability for central Bengaluru
content: The Purple Line is a predictable option for Indiranagar to MG Road because it avoids Old Airport Road and central business district traffic.

title: Rain and last-mile walking
content: Moderate rain mainly affects last-mile comfort. If the walk is below ten minutes, metro plus umbrella remains a strong option.
